mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.title, p.slug, p.summary, p.cover_image, p.author_id, p.category_id, p.status, p.is_top, p.is_featured, p.allow_comment, p.password, p.source_type, p.source_url, p.seo_keywords, p.seo_description, p.published_time, p.last_comment_time, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.del_flag, u.nick_name AS author_name FROM blog_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.author_id = u.user_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
